framework.name: Mastercard Agentic Tokens — Existing Tokenization Repurposed
framework.description: Mastercard Agent Pay live for all US cardholders since Nov 2025. Uses existing tokenization infrastructure to tie AI agents to individual users. Dedicated agentic commerce cohort in Start Path accelerator. Working with Microsoft for Copilot Checkout.
framework.raw_quote: At the center of Agent Pay are Mastercard Agentic Tokens — leveraging existing tokenization infrastructure to uniquely tie AI agents to individual users.

source.title: The Agentic Commerce Landscape: Who's Building What in 2026
